reference_report:
检查所见：
双侧大脑、小脑半球对称，脑灰白质分界清楚，颅内脑质内未见信号改变；中线结构居中，脑室、脑池系统大小、形态未见异常；脑沟、脑裂不宽，脑干未见信号异常改变；蝶鞍不大，内垂体未见形态及信号异常改变；双侧眼球大小及位置亦无特殊，头皮软组织未见形态及信号异常改变。扫及左侧筛窦内层状、结节状T2WI高信号影。
诊断印象:
颅脑MRI平扫未见明显异常。扫及左侧筛窦炎。

candidate_reports.report_text: Findings: The brain MRI shows a large area of edema centered in the right frontal lobe, extending into parts of the parietal and temporal lobes. The white matter is diffusely hypointense with interspersed regions of both increased signal intensity as well as normal appearing tissue within these areas. Edema appears to be primarily concentrated around the junction between the frontal and parietal lobes on the right side. Ventricular compression is evident due to surrounding edematous changes affecting adjacent structures but not yet showing signs of collapse or shift. No focal lesions are identified.
